name: Amerant Bancorp Inc.
summary: Our Company We are a bank holding company headquartered in Coral Gables, FL, with $9.8 billion in assets, $6.6 billion in loans held for investment, $7.8 billion in deposits, $938.8 million of shareholders equity, and $3.3 billion in assets under management and custody (AUM) as of December31, 2025. We provide individuals and businesses with a comprehensive array of deposit, credit, investment, wealth management, retail banking, mortgage services and fiduciary services.
